members.name: Venusaur
members.notes: Tu starter. Sleep Powder + Leech Seed combo defensivo. Giga Drain (TM19, premio Erika) STAB.

members.name: Nidoking
members.notes: Nidoran♂ Route 3. Coverage insano con TMs. Earthquake late game.

members.name: Ninetales
members.notes: Vulpix Route 7 (exclusivo LeafGreen). Confuse Ray es utilísimo. Flamethrower (TM35).

members.name: Jolteon
members.notes: Eevee en Celadon → Thunder Stone. Thunderbolt (TM24) prioridad de compra.

members.name: Lapras
members.notes: Regalo en Silph Co. Tu Water type principal. Ice Beam CLAVE para Lance.

members.name: Snorlax
members.notes: Route 12/16. Tanque bruto. Clave contra Agatha y Sabrina.
